welcome.content: 👋 Schools, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

role_1.question: Name + role of person completing this form

role_2.question: Relationship with the student
role_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognition_1.question: Does the student have attention and concentration difficulties in lessons?
cognition_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognition_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognition_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognition_4.question: Does the student run out of time in standard-conditions tests / mocks?
cognition_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
